info.title: AutomatX API
info.description:
## Authentication

Protected endpoints support two authentication methods:

### 1. API Key (for automation / N8N)
Send the header: `x-api-key: <API_SECRET_KEY>`

### 2. Supabase Session (for admin UI)
The admin interface uses Supabase session cookies set after login at `/admin`.

---

All error responses follow: `{ "error": "message" }`

SupabaseSession.name: sb-access-token
SupabaseSession.description: Supabase session cookie (set after admin login)

tags.name: Blog
tags.description: Blog posts CRUD and media upload

get.description: Returns service liveness. Add `?check=db` to also verify database connectivity.

parameters.name: check
parameters.description: Pass `db` to run a database readiness check

post.description: Public endpoint. Creates a new lead from contact form, WhatsApp, or other source.

get.description: Admin only. Returns paginated list of leads with optional status filter.
Admin only. Returns a single lead including related bookings.

put.description: Admin only. Update lead status and/or notes.

post.description: Public endpoint. Creates a booking and automatically creates or reuses a lead record by email.

get.description: Admin only. Returns paginated bookings with lead details.
Admin only. Includes lead details and questionnaire response if submitted.

put.description: Admin only. Update booking status or mark questionnaire as completed.

post.description: Public endpoint. Submits pre-session questionnaire for a booking. One submission per booking (returns 409 if duplicate).

409.description: Questionnaire already submitted for this booking

get.description: Admin only. Retrieves questionnaire response for a specific booking.

200.description: Questionnaire response with booking and lead

get.description: Public: returns published posts only. Authenticated users can request drafts with `?status=draft`.

post.description: Admin only. Creates a new blog post. If `status` is `published`, sets `publishedAt` automatically.

get.summary: Get post by slug or ID
get.description: Public: returns published posts only. Authenticated users can also retrieve drafts. The `{id}` param accepts either a UUID or the post slug.

put.description: Admin only. Partial update — only send the fields you want to change. If changing `status` to `published` and `publishedAt` is not set, it will be set automatically.

application/json.description: All fields are optional for partial update

delete.description: Admin only. Permanently deletes a post.

post.description: Admin only. Uploads an image file. SVG is blocked for security. Max size: 10MB. Accepted: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF.

get.description: Public: returns active services only, ordered by `displayOrder`. Pass `?includeInactive=true` (requires auth) to get all services.
Public: returns active projects only, ordered by `displayOrder`. Pass `?includeInactive=true` (requires auth) to get all.
Public endpoint. Returns all dynamic text content. Use `?section=hero` to filter by section.

put.description: Admin only. Bulk upsert content items by key.

get.description: Admin only. Returns all site settings (JSON values).

put.description: Admin only. Bulk upsert settings by key. Values can be any JSON type.

post.description: Public endpoint. If the email was previously deactivated, it will be reactivated.

delete.description: Admin only. Default mode is `deactivate` (soft). Use `?mode=delete` for permanent removal.
